name: Daffodil
description: Chaos support with bright, theatrical energy—her awakenings turn fights into a spectacle as she nudges allies toward bigger moments without stealing the spotlight.

seo.title: Daffodil — Support
seo.description: Daffodil offers Chaos support in Neverness to Everness—flashy kit, team-oriented play, and a supportive role that shines during awakening bursts.
